2026-04-28T16:05:58.9031118Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs/audit dirs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9031474Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs/audit dirs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9031627Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9031990Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9032328Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9032442Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9032586Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9032665Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9032847Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:58.9032925Z [36;1mfi[0m
